summary: The diff implements the majority of the requested requirements for the NexNam portfolio SPA. All 13 requirements appear to be substantially addressed. However, several specific acceptance criteria have gaps: the Services section uses a custom TiltCard implementation rather than react-parallax-tilt, Framer Motion is not used anywhere (replaced with custom IntersectionObserver hooks and CSS transitions), the Testimonials section uses manual setInterval auto-scroll rather than an Embla auto-scroll plugin, and the Process section's connecting line animation does not use Framer Motion scroll progress. Additionally, a backend/main.mo file and Internet Identity hooks were added which conflict with the no-backend constraint.

missing_requirements.requirement: Cards tilt on mouse hover via react-parallax-tilt
missing_requirements.reason: The ServicesSection implements a custom TiltCard component with manual mouse event handlers instead of using the react-parallax-tilt library as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Text elements animate in with staggered Framer Motion transitions
missing_requirements.reason: HeroSection uses custom CSS transitions with inline styles and a visibility state flag, not Framer Motion. No framer-motion import is present in the hero section.

missing_requirements.requirement: Timeline and stat animations trigger when the section scrolls into view using Framer Motion scroll-triggered animation
missing_requirements.reason: AboutSection uses a custom useInView hook with IntersectionObserver and CSS transitions instead of Framer Motion whileInView.

missing_requirements.requirement: Embla Carousel renders with auto-scroll enabled using the Embla auto-scroll plugin
missing_requirements.reason: TestimonialsSection uses useEmblaCarousel but implements auto-scroll via a manual setInterval rather than the official embla-carousel-autoplay or autoScroll plugin.

missing_requirements.requirement: Connecting line between steps animates fill on scroll triggered by Framer Motion scroll progress
missing_requirements.reason: ProcessSection implements the animated line via a manual scroll event listener with useState, not Framer Motion's useScroll/useTransform scroll progress APIs.

missing_requirements.requirement: Scroll-triggered animations use Framer Motion whileInView throughout
missing_requirements.reason: All sections use a custom useInView hook with IntersectionObserver and CSS transitions rather than Framer Motion's whileInView or useInView APIs.

hallucinated_features.description: backend/main.mo file added with an empty Motoko actor
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states no backend canister or Motoko logic is needed and that this is a purely frontend SPA. Adding a backend file was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: useActor.ts and useInternetIdentity.ts hooks included with full Internet Identity and AuthClient integration logic
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states no Internet Identity or authentication is needed. These hooks implement full II authentication infrastructure that was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Caffeine.ai referral link added in Footer
hallucinated_features.reason: No such external referral link was mentioned in the build request. The footer spec only calls for NexNam logo, tagline, nav links, social icons, email, and copyright text.
